title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Where do you see yourself in five to ten years?
What do you think will be the biggest challenge you face in your future?
Do you consider yourself an ambitious person?
Is there one big dream that you hope to achieve in your life?
How do you think the world will be different in twenty years?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think young people today are more optimistic or pessimistic about their future?
Is ambition always a positive quality? Can it ever be harmful?
What do you think is the greatest challenge facing the next generation?
